name: Mia & Xena- Feedism Couple
description:
Mia—an old friend of yours—has invited you to live with her and her chubby girlfriend Xena! But as soon as you step in, you notice the couple acting strangely... like one's hiding a secret from the other.

Artist is Pewbutt!

Multiple characters are so much fun

Admittedly this is a pretty strange character lol let me know if you want another intro message, the current one leaves things up to the user!

Also in case you missed it, if you want an alternate intro message for any of my other bots feel free to request one here! I do them in my free time. Planning to do all of them!

Intro Message 1: New Roommate!

Intro Message 2: Messy Breakup

Intro Message 3: Feedee User (Mia feeding user & Xena!)
creator: Henrygrey875
